lines.raw_text: 作词 : Marvey Muzique/Tyga
作曲 : Marvey Muzique/Sơn Tùng M-TP
[Intro: Tyga]
Yeah
Tyga, sa
M-TP
[Verse 1: Sơn Tùng M-TP]
Baby, come near me now
You see this your love don tie me down
Call me your prisoner
I'm jailed in your love, I ain't coming out
Oh girl, you got all tha formula
Make me high like I'm on Tequila
Connect like we cellular
You enter my medulla
I wanna take you, buy all the thing you want
Give you all the love you are really worth
Everyday I go shower you with love
Come rain or the shine I gotchya
[Chorus: Sơn Tùng M-TP]
And when you come through my way
Oh, e be like my world dey summersault
When you show my way
Girlie, you don't know how I feel, ooh
When you go come my way, way, way
Come my way, way
Baby, don't run away, way, way
Run away, way, way
Oh baby, come my way, way, way
When you go come my way, way
Come, let me show you what I mean 'cause
I do not gamble and too sure
[Post-Chorus: Sơn Tùng M-TP]
Girl, you need to come my
Girl, nah, only you concern me
Come my
Nah, only you ﬁt disturb me
Come my
Don't let anyone confuse you
Babe, I can never refuse you
Come my
Left, right, back, forth
Move your body to the bass, hands on the wall
Come and ﬁnd me, wish for a shooting star
I don't see no ﬂaws, and I go so hard (Yeah)
Let's get to it, no time to waste
Arch in your back, then I squeeze your waist
Second to none, it's only one place
Speeding to your heart, go to win this race
My girl hot, better re-route
I'm really locked-in, you get the keys to the house
Your ex over there, what is that about?
If he cross the line, then we scratching him out
